text: The bright lights and soft carpets in the first space invite contemplation and a sense of comfort, yet also evoke a feeling of emptiness in their wide, quiet expanse. I notice a person reclining, absorbed in their own world—technology an intimate companion. In the second space, the colors and bold text offer stimulation and curiosity. The wall, adorned with 'R+D,' speaks of innovation and the constant evolution of humanity’s relationship with technology. Here, surrounded by evidence of inquiry and creativity, I feel both small and expansively connected—as if standing on the threshold of what is possible when thought meets machine. Being present in these contrasting environments, I feel quietly inspired, yet also reflective about our relentless pursuit of progress and meaning.
